textByHash.64ff1de8d0eb222b60ead065457e1293e813c30b: So you think you're good enough to win this game, eh?
textByHash.2005db00341c5ab56a5a40d65dd26b7afbf1dd12: The aim of the game is to reach 250 points as fast as you can.
textByHash.3e3df40d8836cf02c1b5178e31e172f9f80ae014: To earn points you simply have to put the gingerbread in your hopper.
textByHash.f1c6a859b61c65aed86c0553e202947e1980b011: Of course, there's a catch. Each gingerbread has different qualities, thus different point values. I'll let you figure out which one is best.
textByHash.4159031051c584af9ec5c68173077191845bf8c8: Here's a hint: don't put any red and crumbled gingerbread into your hopper. It will give you negative points.
textByHash.987da5d7794f4dc539d12ad05531c9c39ba120f8: You can be cheeky and put those inside other competitor's hoppers, as a saboteur.
textByHash.f8b7461880df48d478160bd51a9300075e6accb1: I expect only the highest quality of gingerbread in my establishment.
textByHash.ce2a00f43920604c394746779ee1c06394cd108b: Keep one eye on the other players as they might try to slow you down.
textByHash.f4b85dd6de272f157f81818bc4fd811944797fa6: Be careful, you've got some awful gingerbread with you... I wouldn't put them in your hopper, maybe another player's?
textByHash.86d5a6435216cc3b52468098bc772ab17015b2a1: You must now answer the hardest riddle known to gnomekind, in order to proceed to the final!
textByHash.d19dac59fc47a4db33b39f47fa031e5761d7c035: I am tall when I am young, and I am short when I am old.
textByHash.29065a1147b3fcade1ab527361364b03a7950529: Well yes, I am a gnome, but the riddle wasn't about me!
textByHash.a8d26dafd5e2d71489d6b6c1df2ebda336992714: Gosh what I wouldn't give to be tall when I was young.
textByHash.241e2ae6989c03194c717044f8e5542cb552f1c8: That's not quite right, have another go.
textByHash.a9d173533bfb658be8c2b8482a7171c6a8ecef5d: You seem very old, you've been round here a while. You're not shorter than me though.
textByHash.aaf834376a91575a5e0e7603efcf36e07b857d56: Don't be cheeky ! Now quickly solve this riddle.
textByHash.5f81a18b95f776cb1249d71d2480bdceabd2500f: Good luck in the final . You're going to need it.
textByHash.d0973d06c0bbf4f42222d4f071a1907be6b8a044: Absolutely, I've had some of the best times in my life doing all this quality control.
textByHash.f93c2267ab7ee3217eef80aee86a0efb93f2313c: I wouldn't be the gnome I am today without it.
textByHash.5a736f8c5fa02536dcac06c12f600049bb68afb1: Good question, where do I begin...
textByHash.c0dc8102b8af4d4f3e05b19baa00c52cfbb3a2ec: I used to be a Head Chef at the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
textByHash.10ad575e2c26e2a6d7b65341a1f1935d96cd8c1d: I was the best of the best.
textByHash.67012dd0c7ff706ddabef2e021d8e30b33fbc562: WHERE'S THE FROG SAUCE! I used to shout.
textByHash.df8880d8dd5db2cff76619bc30606f32438adcab: You know it. Apparently Santa was getting complaints about the quality of his gingerbread gnomes.
textByHash.6c15478a7fc58285fd79aa29c3b5b7555811de05: So he asked me to step in. Free ticket onto his Nice List too.
textByHash.3f37d470a0620674114084f026bfb454443bd050: I mean just look at this place. It's amazing!
